How it works

Three steps to
your next game

No phone calls. No group chats. No guessing who's at what level.

01
🔍
Browse sessions

Filter by suburb, skill level, age range, and time. Every session shows real availability — no surprises.

02
👥
See who's playing

Know exactly how many players have already booked and how many spots are left before you commit.

03
✅
Book & pay instantly

Secure your spot with a single tap. Payment handled securely. Confirmation sent straight to your phone.

Simple pricing

Pay per session,
save with packages

🏸
Single Session
$40-60
Per session · Pay as you go
SAVE 5%
🎯
5 Sessions
$190-285
5% discount · Best for regulars
SAVE 10%
🔥
10 Sessions
$360-540
10% discount · Best value
💡 All packages include: Expert coaching · Equipment if needed · Instant booking · Secure payment

Vishal Singh Lather

Upload coach video

💡 Tips:
• Recommended: MP4 format, H.264 codec
• Max size: 100MB
• Vertical (9:16) format works best for mobile
• Video will be publicly accessible
